title: The $300 Wake-Up Call
content: Did a subscription audit on myself once. Found three hundred dollars a month going to things I forgot existed. THREE HUNDRED. A meditation app I never opened. A gym across town. Two streaming services with the same shows. That was a wake-up call.
extended_content: I went through my credit card statement line by line. It took two hours. Every time I saw a recurring charge, I asked: 'Did I use this in the last month?' Most of the answer was no. Some of those subscriptions I'd had for YEARS. Three hundred dollars a month is thirty-six hundred a year. That's a vacation. That's half an emergency fund. Gone to things I didn't even use.
when_to_tell: when discussing subscriptions or spending leaks
lesson: Subscription creep is real - audit regularly
